weapons.name: Iron Knife
weapons.description: A simple iron knife, reliable in close-quarters combat.

weapons.name: Flintlock Pistol
weapons.description: A single-shot flintlock pistol. Common in the Loen Kingdom.

weapons.name: Officer's Saber
weapons.description: A military-grade saber used by Loen officers. Sharp and well-balanced.

weapons.name: Beyonder's Staff
weapons.description: A staff infused with minor Beyonder characteristics. Enhances spiritual powers.

weapons.name: Silver Revolver
weapons.description: A revolver with silver chambers, effective against supernatural creatures.

weapons.name: Ancient Rune Blade
weapons.description: A blade inscribed with ancient runes from the Fourth Epoch.

weapons.name: Characteristic-Infused Dagger
weapons.description: A dagger infused with Beyonder characteristics, humming with power.

weapons.name: Demigod Artifact Blade
weapons.description: A blade forged from a demigod's artifact. Nearly indestructible.

armor.name: Traveler's Coat
armor.description: A sturdy traveling coat that offers minor protection.

armor.name: Leather Vest
armor.description: A reinforced leather vest worn by experienced adventurers.

armor.name: Mystical Robes
armor.description: Robes imbued with spiritual energy, preferred by Beyonders who use powers.

armor.name: Knight's Armor
armor.description: Full plate armor worn by knights. Heavy but extremely protective.

armor.name: Beyonder Vestment
armor.description: Vestments crafted from the hide of powerful Beyonder creatures.

consumables.name: Minor Healing Potion
consumables.description: A basic healing potion brewed from common herbs.

consumables.name: Healing Potion
consumables.description: A reliable healing potion used by adventurers throughout the kingdom.

consumables.name: Spirit Tonic
consumables.description: Restores spiritual energy spent on Beyonder powers.

consumables.name: Advanced Healing Potion
consumables.description: A powerful healing potion used in emergency situations.

consumables.name: Beyonder Characteristic Fragment
consumables.description: A fragment of a Beyonder characteristic that can be consumed for power.

materials.name: Rat Pelt
materials.description: A pelt from a mutated city rat.

materials.name: Ectoplasm
materials.description: Residue left behind by ghosts and spirits.

materials.name: Werewolf Claw
materials.description: A claw torn from a werewolf.

materials.name: Moon Stone
materials.description: A stone infused with lunar energy.

materials.name: Beast Hide
materials.description: The hide of a powerful beast.

materials.name: Arcane Dust
materials.description: Residual magical energy in powdered form.

materials.name: Spirit Essence
materials.description: The concentrated essence of a spirit.

materials.name: Chaos Fragment
materials.description: A fragment of pure chaotic energy from the deep sea.

materials.name: Beyonder Characteristic
materials.description: The essential characteristic of a Beyonder creature.

materials.name: Demigod Essence
materials.description: Pure essence from a demigod being.

materials.name: Gold Coin Pouch
materials.description: A pouch containing a small amount of gold coins.

materials.name: Puppet Fragment
materials.description: A piece of an animated puppet.

materials.name: Crimson Ritual Scroll
materials.description: A scroll containing dark ritual instructions.

materials.name: Dark Blessing Vial
materials.description: A vial containing a dark blessing from the God of Calamity.

materials.name: Deep Sea Scale
materials.description: A scale from a creature of the deep.

materials.name: Abyssal Essence
materials.description: Essence from the abyssal depths.

materials.name: Potion Fragment
materials.description: A fragment of a powerful Beyonder potion.

materials.name: Sealed Article
materials.description: A small sealed artifact of unknown power.

materials.name: Ancient Soul Crystal
materials.description: A crystal containing the soul of an ancient being.

materials.name: Wraith Essence
materials.description: The concentrated essence of an ancient wraith.

materials.name: Epoch Relic
materials.description: A relic from a previous epoch of the world.

materials.name: Dragon Scale Fragment
materials.description: A fragment of an evil dragon's scale.

materials.name: Draconic Essence
materials.description: Pure draconic essence from an evil dragon.

materials.name: Cult Grimoire
materials.description: A grimoire belonging to evil dragon cultists.

materials.name: Divinity Fragment
materials.description: A fragment of true divinity.

materials.name: Mythic Relic
materials.description: A relic of mythic, legendary power.
